backend_organizer_revenue_breakdown_api.events_breakdown structure: PASS - 20 events with event_id, title, inscriptions_total, inscriptions_fees, inscriptions_count, price, current_participants, max_participants

context_for_next_testing_agent: Organizer Finances section implemented. GET /api/organizer/revenue-breakdown returns: sources (5 keys: inscriptions, dons, sponsors, produits, reservations with total/fees/net/count/label), grand_total, grand_fees, grand_net, monthly (12 entries), events_breakdown (per-event inscriptions data), recent_transactions (mixed types). Frontend uses FinancesSection.js with Recharts. Section accessed via hub card 'Finances'. Similar to Admin Revenus tab but for organizer scope only.
